articleLabel: Archive-inspired generated article. This is not an original historical news article.

actions.title: gather for a public event
actions.description: A crowd forms, programs are read, and the square becomes a stage.

actions.title: question an old memory
actions.description: A familiar place is reconsidered through fragments of the past.

actions.title: celebrate a local tradition
actions.description: Ritual returns—music, speeches, and shared food at the centre.

actions.title: report a forgotten story
actions.description: Notes from the archive desk reopen a thread the city stopped telling.

actions.title: reshape the public space
actions.description: Benches move, paths change, and neighbors argue over who the square is for.

times.title: 1950s
times.styleHint: Use restrained official language and postwar civic optimism.

times.title: 1970s
times.styleHint: Use a socially aware local newspaper voice.

times.title: 1980s
times.styleHint: Emphasise neighborhood colour and everyday city rhythm.

times.title: Today
times.styleHint: Use a contemporary, multi-voice local feed tone.

tones.title: Nostalgic
tones.description: Warm memory; soft focus on what was lost and found again.
tones.styleHint: Frame the article with gentle retrospection, not certainty.

tones.title: Critical
tones.description: Emphasises tension, responsibility, and unresolved questions.
tones.styleHint: Frame the article around public concern and accountability.

tones.title: Civic
tones.description: Shared duty, meetings, and collective problem-solving.
tones.styleHint: Emphasise community roles and public deliberation.

tones.title: Humorous
tones.description: Light human detail; the desk notices absurdity without mockery.
tones.styleHint: Allow wit in pacing and observation, not at the expense of dignity.

tones.title: Suspicious
tones.description: Skeptical attention to gaps, silences, and who controls the narrative.
tones.styleHint: Highlight what is missing from the official account.
